zh.lifeSummary: 當Uberto Visconti Seigneur de Massino, Albizzate et Besnate於1170年出生在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾時，他的父親Roger Consul Of Milan70歲，母親Garizia Geneve23歲。他於大約1202年與COUNTESS CASATI Pirovano在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1268年在他的家鄉享年98歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Uberto Visconti Seigneur de Massino, Albizzate et Besnate于1170年出生在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾时，他的父亲Roger Consul Of Milan70岁，母亲Garizia Geneve23岁。他于大约1202年与COUNTESS CASATI Pirovano在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1268年在他的家乡享年98岁。

nameMeanings.name: Visconti
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Pasquale, Rocco, Umberto, Amerigo, Angelo, Carlo, Domenic, Ennio, Gaetano, Gerlando, Gino.  French Laurent, Camille, Girard.

Italian: from visconte, a title of rank (medieval Latin vicecomes ‘deputy of a count’). Unusually (since most noble families took their surnames from their estates), the surname was sometimes of literal application, but without doubt it is also in part a nickname for someone who gave himself airs and graces, and in part a metonymic occupational name for someone in the employ of a viscount. This surname is also found in southern France.

variants.name: Viscomi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Emilio, Salvatore, Antonio, Beniamino, Filomena, Mario, Rodolfo, Santo.
Italian: Sicilian and Calabrian form of Visconti , from medieval Latin viscomes ‘deputy’, Greek biskōmēs.

nameMeanings.name: Uberto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: See Humbert . The former Italian royal family is descended from the Blessed Umberto of Savoy ( 1136–88 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Uberto Visconti Seigneur de Massino, Albizzate et Besnate was born in 1170, in Milan, Lombardy, Italy, his father, Roger Consul Of Milan, was 70 and his mother, Garizia Geneve, was 23. He married COUNTESS CASATI Pirovano about 1202, in Milan, Lombardy, Italy. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1268, in his hometown, at the age of 98.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Uberto Visconti Seigneur de Massino, Albizzate et Besnate est né en 1170, à Milano, Lombardia, Italie, son père, Roger Consul Of Milan, avait 70 ans et sa mère, Garizia Geneve, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé COUNTESS CASATI Pirovano environ 1202, à Milano, Lombardia, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1268, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 98 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Uberto Visconti Seigneur de Massino, Albizzate et Besnate 1170 in Milano, Lombardei, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Consul Of Milan 70 und seine Mutter Garizia Geneve 23. Er hat um 1202 in Milano, Lombardei, Italien COUNTESS CASATI Pirovano geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1268 im Alter von 98 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Uberto Visconti Seigneur de Massino, Albizzate et Besnate è nato il nel 1170 nel Milano, Lombardia, Italia, il suo padre, Roger Consul Of Milan, aveva 70 anni e il suo madre, Garizia Geneve, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato COUNTESS CASATI Pirovano circa 1202, nel Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1268, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 98 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Uberto Visconti Seigneur de Massino, Albizzate et Besnateが1170年にイタリアロンバーディアミラノで生まれた時，父Roger Consul Of Milanは70歳，母Garizia Geneveは23歳であった。約1202年にイタリアロンバーディアミラノでCOUNTESS CASATI Pirovanoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1268年に故郷で98歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Uberto Visconti Seigneur de Massino, Albizzate et Besnate(이)가 1170년 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Consul Of Milan(은)는 70세였고, 그의 어머니 Garizia Geneve(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1202년 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오에서 COUNTESS CASATI Pirovano(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1268년 그의 고향에서 98세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Uberto Visconti Seigneur de Massino, Albizzate et Besnate nasceu em 1170, em Milano, Lombardia, Itália, seu pai, Roger Consul Of Milan, tinha 70 anos e sua mãe, Garizia Geneve, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com COUNTESS CASATI Pirovano aproximadamente 1202, em Milano, Lombardia, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1268, em sua cidade natal, com 98 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Uberto Visconti Seigneur de Massino, Albizzate et Besnate родился в 1170 г. в местности милано, ломбардя, Италия, его отцу по имени Roger Consul Of Milan было 70 лет, а матери, которую звали Garizia Geneve, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени COUNTESS CASATI Pirovano около 1202 г. в местности милано, ломбардя, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1268 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 98 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Uberto Visconti Seigneur de Massino, Albizzate et Besnate nació en 1170, en Milano, Lombardia, Italia, su papá, Roger Consul Of Milan, tenía 70 años y su mamá, Garizia Geneve, tenía 23 años. Se casó con COUNTESS CASATI Pirovano aproximadamente 1202, en Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1268, en su pueblo, a la edad de 98 años.
